## Technical Decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| Use Option B for device accessor | `IMuRenderer::GetDevice()` virtual method — no new header, cleaner abstraction |
| `GetDevice()` returns `void*` not `SDL_GPUDevice*` | Avoids pulling SDL3 headers into `MuRenderer.h` unconditionally |
| Per-texture sampler (Option A) | Simpler to implement, SDL_gpu samplers are lightweight |
| Forward-declare `SDL_GPUTexture`/`SDL_GPUSampler` | Avoid pulling SDL3 headers into GlobalBitmap.h |
| Synchronous copy command buffer for upload | Asset loading is synchronous — acceptable pattern |
| `MapGLFilterToSDL`/`MapGLWrapToSDL`/`PadRGBToRGBA` at global scope | Anonymous namespace would prevent test TU linkage |
| `mu::UnregisterTexture` forward-declared outside `#ifdef MU_ENABLE_SDL3` | Called unconditionally in `UnloadImage`; safe no-op on GL path |
